resources.string: BlindReader provides spoken feedback so that you can use your device without looking at the screen. BlindReader can be helpful for people who have difficulty seeing the screen.

How to use BlindReader
• Swipe right or left to move between items
• Double-tap to activate an item
• Drag two fingers to scroll

How to turn off BlindReader
1. In Settings, tap Use BlindReader. There will be an outline. Double-tap it.
2. On the confirmation message, tap Stop. There will be an outline. Double-tap it.
